# tableModule

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for TableModule records via csdk CLI

## Usage

```bash
csdk table-module list
csdk table-module get --id <value>
csdk table-module create --databaseId <value> --nodeType <value> [--schemaId <value>] [--tableId <value>] [--tableName <value>] [--useRls <value>] [--data <value>] [--fields <value>]
csdk table-module update --id <value> [--databaseId <value>] [--schemaId <value>] [--tableId <value>] [--tableName <value>] [--nodeType <value>] [--useRls <value>] [--data <value>] [--fields <value>]
csdk table-module delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all tableModule records

```bash
csdk table-module list
```

### Create a tableModule

```bash
csdk table-module create --databaseId <value> --nodeType <value> [--schemaId <value>] [--tableId <value>] [--tableName <value>] [--useRls <value>] [--data <value>] [--fields <value>]
```

### Get a tableModule by id

```bash
csdk table-module get --id <value>
```
